message:
test: clippy/style cleanup in JS runtime ordering + rewrite grep glob test

- js_runtime_ordering.rs: add clippy::future_not_send allow (QuickJS is
  single-threaded), fix raw string literal escaping (r#"..."# → r"..."),
  replace panic! with unreachable!() in test helper, move HostcallKind
  use-import to top of block for clarity, fix doc comments to use backtick
  formatting for type names
- tools_conformance.rs: replace e2e_grep_glob_filter_with_artifacts test
  with e2e_grep_with_context_lines — the new test verifies that the
  context parameter works correctly by checking adjacent lines appear in
  output around a TARGET match, which exercises a more useful code path
  than the previous glob-filter test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
